_schema: One JSON object per line — the code agent's structured cycle log (append-only). Fields: date (YYYY-MM-DD), backlog_id (int, from BACKLOG.md), item (one line), files (list of repo-relative paths changed), gates ({import:bool, verify_storyboard:bool, verify:bool, code_review:bool, build:bool|null}), branch (autoimprove/YYYY-MM-DD-slug), decision (main|pr|discarded|reverted — 'main' = gated commit shipped straight to main, the default since 2026-07-06; 'pr' = draft-PR fallback for changes the gate could not fully verify), pr (commit sha, PR URL, or null), notes (why discarded/reverted / operator follow-up). The agent skips any line containing _schema.
note: Seed line. Real cycles are appended below by the code agent.

item: MANAGER_PUBLIC_BASE_URL pins the OAuth redirect_uri (portal reconnect redirect_uri_mismatch)
notes: verified live on isolated :7272/:7273 instances (pinned Host=channels.owera.com -> loopback redirect_uri; unset -> legacy request-derived, localhost unchanged); 5 new regression checks; code-review: 2 correctness candidates refuted, 1 comment-duplication finding fixed; OPERATOR: set MANAGER_PUBLIC_BASE_URL=http://localhost:7070 in .env to activate (inert until then); sha = this commit

discovered 2026-07-06 (fork exhaustion self-recovered silently); reading is two cheap forks (sysctl kern.maxproc + ps -A), fails closed to None on any error so a broken reading can't crash /health or flip status; verify_health grew 12->17 checks (mocked degraded/ok/threshold-boundary + real sysctl/ps path); /verify on scratch port 7274 + throwaway sqlite showed a real reading (44.6%); code-review: manual diff-scoped pass (small 2-file diff), no findings, confirmed no clash with the separate /api/health route; deployed via launchctl kickstart, post-restart /health on :7070 confirms status ok with system.processes populated (45.1%); sha=4bdb1e5

item: self-healing OAuth alert on token expiry (notify.py: exactly one alert per CONNECTED->EXPIRED flip; ERROR log always, webhook POST when MANAGER_ALERT_WEBHOOK_URL set)
notes: hooked both transition sites (publish_loop NeedsConnect + dashboard oauth-status probe; tick skips non-connected channels so each site is a genuine one-time flip); /verify on scratch :7460 drove a REAL invalid_grant roundtrip: one ERROR alert + one webhook POST with executable reconnect recipe, repeat check silent, webhook-down still 200 + alert, tokenless channel silent; code-review: 8-angle fan-out, 14 candidates -> 6 fixed (worst: verify_notify.py could POST fake alerts to the operator's REAL webhook if MANAGER_ALERT_WEBHOOK_URL set when running the suite; also alert-before-commit gated persistence on the webhook, urllib fd leak -> httpx, Discord needs content key, never-raise hardening), 3 accepted w/ rationale (cross-thread dup page rare+harmless, transient-flap false page narrow window, at-most-once delivery has log+digest fallback), remainder filed as BACKLOG 3b (metrics/analytics loops swallow NeedsConnect silently -- the silent-death class survives during a publishing lull; DISCONNECTED/ERROR flips unalerted; choke-point consolidation); OPERATOR (optional): set MANAGER_ALERT_WEBHOOK_URL in .env for push alerts (Slack text + Discord content compatible); inert (log-only) until then

item: silent-death choke point: notify.mark_dead/mark_dead_committed consolidate every CONNECTED->dead flip (metrics/analytics lull detection, admin+playlist 409/400s, failed consents, token-file-loss classification)
notes: all suites green (verify_notify 24->62, verify_publish updated for intentional EXPIRED/DISCONNECTED classification fix); /verify on scratch :7171 + local webhook sink drove oauth-status probe, admin 409, playlists 400, metrics tick, failed consent, stale callback: each incident flipped durably + alerted exactly ONCE (repeat calls silent), stale callback left CONNECTED untouched, webhook-down still 200 + warning; code-review: 8-angle fan-out ~35 candidates -> fixed the big one (loops alerted BEFORE commit: rollback re-arms guard -> duplicate pages; refresh-metrics 502 path lost the flip entirely) via mark_dead_committed used everywhere, plus stale-callback guard, playlists wiring, deleted legacy oauth_expired, flattened analytics probe; accepted-with-rationale items recorded as follow-ups under BACKLOG 3b resolution (transient RefreshError false positive is pre-existing _load_creds coercion; consent-cancel ERROR flip pre-existing; topic_playlist swallow caught next tick)

item: one-command loopback reconnect CLI (python -m app.reconnect): own redirect loop, verify-before-write guards (refresh token, full scopes, same-channel identity), atomic 0600 token writes + .bak, complete disconnect, CLI-first alert recipe
notes: all suites green (new verify_reconnect 47 checks; notify 62, publish 22, storyboard 40, growth 25, health 17, oauth_redirect 5 unchanged); /verify drove the REAL CLI subprocess on a scratch DB/credentials + local mock of Google's token endpoint: full consent roundtrip, stray preconnect mid-consent did NOT abort the flow, identity gate vs REAL Google 401 refused before any write (old token byte-identical, DB untouched), success path (identity stubbed) flipped CONNECTED with .bak rotation; code-review: 8-angle fan-out ~30 candidates -> 4 verifier agents on contested ones; fixed 11 (run_local_server single-request abort on stray connections -> own redirect loop; _load_creds non-atomic refresh write + mid-refresh clobber race; commit-after-save traceback contract gap; disconnect leaving live refresh token in .bak; stale alert recipe; isdigit/slug shadowing; 0644 perms; tmp-name collision; kwargs/flow/identity duplication -> reuse build_flow/authorization_url/identity_for_creds; test daemonization+timeouts); 1 refuted (granted_scopes fallback is RFC 6749 §5.1-correct); 2 skipped as pre-existing web-path behavior -> filed BACKLOG 4b (extend guards to oauth_callback/finish_flow + shared mark_connected); sha = this commit
